description_long: This is a rectangular, upright Pepsi vending machine with a prominent blue color scheme and bold branding. The front face features a large, high-resolution image of a Pepsi can splashing in water, with the Pepsi logo in white and red. A vertical panel on the right side of the front displays a series of product selection buttons and a payment interface, while a rectangular product retrieval slot is located below the main graphic. The sides of the machine are solid blue with the Pepsi logo and emblem, while the back is plain blue with no visible features. The machine is constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with glass or acrylic possibly covering the front display area. It is designed to be placed in public urban environments for dispensing cold beverages.
description: A tall, rectangular Pepsi vending machine with vivid blue branding, a large front graphic, and a vertical panel for product selection and payment. The sides feature the Pepsi logo, and the machine is built from metal and plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large Pepsi can graphic, product selection buttons, payment interface, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the blue panel with the Pepsi logo and emblem, no interactive features visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain blue panel, no branding, buttons, or slots visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the Pepsi logo and emblem on a blue background.
attribute_display_panel: A small, vertically oriented display panel is located on the right side of the front face, above the product selection buttons. It appears rectangular and may be illuminated.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the right side of the front face, integrated into the vertical panel, and includes a bill acceptor and possibly a card reader.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual product selection buttons is visible on the right side of the front face, each labeled and aligned in a single column.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located below the main graphic on the front face, with a dark opening and possibly a flap.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large Pepsi branding is present on the front and both sides, including the Pepsi logo, red-white-blue emblem, and the word 'PEPSI' in bold white letters on a blue background.
